_description: Default configuration for android-vtx. Any fields starting with '_' are ignored comments.

camera._comment_cameraId: Android Camera2 ID. Usually '0' for main rear, '1' for front.
camera._comment_resolution: Target capture resolution. Width and height must be supported by the camera.
camera._comment_aeLocked: Lock exposure to current value. Reduces flicker for FPV when true.
camera._comment_aeCompensation: Exposure compensation in 1/6 EV steps, range usually -12 to +12.
camera._comment_videoStabilization: Electronic Image Stabilization (EIS). False is recommended for FPV to minimize latency.
camera._comment_awbLocked: Lock AWB to current values to prevent color shifting.
camera._comment_shutterSpeed: Manual shutter speed in nanoseconds. 0 = auto.

encoder._comment_bitrate: Target video bitrate in bits per second (e.g., 4000000 = 4 Mbps).
encoder._comment_keyframeInterval: Keyframe interval (I-frame) in seconds. 1 is standard for FPV recovery.
encoder._comment_intraRefreshPeriod: Intra-refresh period. 0 = disabled. Set to fps/2 for smooth intra-refresh without massive I-frames.
encoder._comment_bFrames: Number of B-frames. Use 0 for FPV to minimize look-ahead encoding latency.
encoder._comment_operatingRate: Operating Rate (fps). Usually matches camera fps. 0 = auto.
encoder._comment_codecLevel: Codec Level. 0=Auto. Warning: Non-zero values may crash some Android HALs.
